title: 聖地がありすぎる件についてなのです♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A fangirl's gotta be ready, always. Which is why I'm currently awake and dressed at 5:00 a.m.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer! I'm so... SO excited for today!
choice_data_list:
You certainly sound ready, getting up so early
and all.

You certainly sound ready, getting up so early
and all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Of course! Anyone'd be pumped for a pilgrimage to oshi sites!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Each Umamusume has their own life story... their own unique legend.
And today, we're going to follow those journeys through a series of
historic locations.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ideally, I would've wanted at least a month for the tour, but I've got
my own races to run, so today's gonna be jam-packed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: So little time, so many oshis. Now, let's get this show on the road!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Here we are! Well, almost. We're here for the flower field over there.
It's called the Restful Garden... by me anyways.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's said that the flowers here have symbolic meanings, which
Umamusume use to confess their true, secret feelings.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In particular, there are several stories of Umas exchanging clovers
with their closest, dearest rival!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And do you know what clovers mean? "Think of me"! "Promise"!
They're promising to have each other in their hearts forever and ever
and everrr!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I. KNOW. RIGHT?! Their feelings run deeper than the Mariana
Trench!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: For our next stop—behold the Park of Sisterly Races!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now, this story's actually about Hayahide. It's said that she used to
race her little sister Brian when they were kids.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Imagine having your own sister as your rival. Just think what it'd be like running around here together... Doesn't it inspire you to run too?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do I ever! Following their footsteps will bring me that much closer to
them in spirit—that's the best part of being a simp! Let's goooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Mmm ahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: O. M. G! This "Ramen of Champions" is everything!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's so good! And, uh... it sure is champion-sized!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: N-not just anyone, could conquer... this... much... uuugh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm fine! Countless challengers have taken this seat, putting their life on the line to take the champion's crown. I have to know... what they felt when... they...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Urp...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We power our way through stop after stop on Digital's simp
pilgrimage until...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
We did it! That honeyade stand was the final stop on our route. What
a day!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: No kidding! For real, thanks for sticking it out for the whole trip! o7

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, also... Hehe. This was a lot of fun.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I was originally planning to go by myself, you know. But...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And that's the pilgrimage, all mapped out! Muhuhwa. ☆ I'm gonna
talk Trainer's ear off when I get back. ♪

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, what do you even mean, "pilgrimage"? But sounds like you're
gonna have a blast!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whoa?! D-did you uh… hear all that? Sorry for being loud!

text_block_list.name: Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Aaanyways, what about your trainer, though? They're not going with
you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait! I-I honestly never thought of that. Me and Trainer... simping
together?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Nnn? NNAAASDFSKJAHLAKLLJASDLA?!!?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And what would you know? Going out with other people is actually
really, reeeeeeally—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: REEEEALLY FUN!
choice_data_list: I had a great time too!
I had a great time too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad to hear it! I wasn't sure if you'd even agree to come, seeing as
it was such an early start on your day off.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It was so worth it though! I feel like I've just unlocked some huge
secret life hack!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I legit can't believe I never thought of this. The two of us can simp
together for double the fun!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I'm still really blown away by the fact that there's
someone on this planet who actually even likes the same stuff I do!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No it's not! As I'm sure you've noticed, I tend to go waaay overboard
with this stuff.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Barely anyone can keep up with the otaku talk, let alone join in on it!
You have no idea how rare a fellow Horsegirl simp is!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But now whenever the feels hit hard, I get so excited to share the
good news with you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? Y-you, you really mean it?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Always?! You're sure??!? You're reeeally sure???!?!1? Because you're
about to unleash the floodgates of my ota—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HOLD THAT THOOOUGHT!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Look. Over there. Is that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Vodka and Daiwa Scarlet?! See? Over by the bridge? It seems like
they're arguing over something.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah! Could this... could this be the birth of a new legend?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: C'mon, don't just stand there! We've gotta hurry! Go, go, go, GO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can get a word in, Digital takes off to get a good view. For
lack of a better plan, I chase after her for one more round of
"simping."
